name: Ego-Exo4D
source_datasets: original capture (paired ego + exo, skilled activity)
data_access: egoexo CLI after signing the Ego-Exo4D license
redistribution: not permitted: gated license; raw narrations and commentary stay local and verbatim text is not republished
suitability: download+cluster target, gated: three real annotation streams behind the license
focus_en: Time-synchronized ego and exo video of skilled activity with atomic action descriptions, narrate-and-act narrations, and expert commentary.
focus_cn: 时间同步的第一人称与第三人称技能活动视频，配有原子动作描述、边做边讲旁白与专家点评三类语言标注。
datapath_en: Ego-Exo4D captures time-synchronized egocentric (Project Aria glasses) and exocentric (GoPro) video of skilled human activity such as cooking, music, dance, sports, and bike repair, from 740 participants across 13 cities and about 1,286 video hours, with audio, eye gaze, and 3D point clouds. It is annotated with three paired natural-language streams: timestamped atomic action descriptions, first-person narrate-and-act narrations spoken while performing, and expert commentary that critiques technique. These streams drive benchmarks for fine-grained keystep recognition, proficiency estimation, and ego-exo correspondence. The data and text are fetched with the egoexo CLI after a signed license, so the strings cannot be redistributed in this atlas.
datapath_cn: Ego-Exo4D 采集时间同步的第一人称（Project Aria 眼镜）与第三人称（GoPro）技能活动视频，涵盖烹饪、音乐、舞蹈、体育与自行车维修等，来自 13 个城市的 740 名参与者，约 1,286 小时，并包含音频、眼动与三维点云。其标注包含三类配对的自然语言流：带时间戳的原子动作描述、参与者边做边讲的第一人称旁白，以及点评技术的专家评注。这些标注流支撑细粒度关键步骤识别、熟练度评估与第一/第三人称对应等基准。数据与文本需在签署许可后通过 egoexo 命令行工具获取，因此字符串无法在本图谱中再分发。
flow_en: three language streams: atomic, narrate-and-act, expert
flow_cn: 同步的第一人称（Aria）+ 第三人称（GoPro）采集
多模态与三维处理、隐私审查
三类语言流：原子、边做边讲、专家点评
关键步骤、熟练度、对应关系标签
no_corpus_en: Ego-Exo4D publishes three rich language streams, making it a strong download+cluster target, but they sit behind a signed dataset license that restricts redistribution. The text can be analyzed locally after approval, yet cannot be republished here, so the entry is descriptive with links to the gated source rather than an embedded clusterable corpus.
no_corpus_cn: Ego-Exo4D 发布了三类丰富的语言流，是很好的下载并聚类目标，但它们受签署的数据集许可约束，限制再分发。获批后可在本地分析文本，但不能在此重新发布，因此本条目以描述性方式呈现，并链接到受限来源，而非内嵌可聚类语料。
example_caption_en: Ego-Exo4D pairs first-person and third-person video of skilled activity; the project page shows synchronized ego and exo views.
example_caption_cn: Ego-Exo4D 将技能活动的第一人称与第三人称视频配对；项目主页展示同步的第一人称与第三人称视角。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2311.18259, ego-exo4d-data.org, and github.com/facebookresearch/Ego4d. Dataset gated under the Ego-Exo4D License (code MIT).
citation: Grauman et al., Ego-Exo4D: Understanding Skilled Human Activity from First- and Third-Person Perspectives, CVPR 2024 (arXiv:2311.18259).
